data.title: Ripple And TradFi Giant SBI Partner To Roll Out RLUSD Stablecoin In Japan By Early 2026
data.description:
Ripple has teamed up with Japanese financial conglomerate SBI Holdings to launch Ripple USD (RLUSD) stablecoin in the Japanese market as early as the first quarter of 2026, as the nation’s freshly crafted stablecoin legislations open its market to foreign issuers. In a Friday announcement, the two companies said they had signed a memorandum of […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/ripple-and-tradfi-giant-sbi-partner-to-roll-out-rlusd-stablecoin-in-japan-by-early-2026/

data.title: Ethereum, Solana As Backbone For Digital Euro: Crypto News Report
data.description:
Key Insights: Un recent crypto news, European policymakers are accelerating work on a digital euro by looking at public blockchain networks for its infrastructure. On August 22, 2025, the Financial Times reported that EU officials are, “…exploring major public blockchain networks like Ethereum and Solana for the digital euro’s design.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/22/ethereum-solana-as-backbone-for-digital-euro-crypto-news-report/
